## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SEO strategy and potential partnership between Dimmo and fwd.digital for content creation and optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers advanced AI-driven workflows for SEO and content creation, with a focus on strategy and customization](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Dimmo needs comprehensive SEO support, aiming to grow organic traffic significantly (100-200k monthly visitors) within a year](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Both parties are interested in a collaborative partnership, with potential for public case study sharing post-success](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

## Topics

### Current Dimmo SEO Situation

  - [Site organically will not grow without intervention](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Focused on attracting sales professionals (managers, directors, VPs, executives)](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Mimicking DeepGram AI pages with YouTube-like features for product pages](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Need strategy for enriching product pages and creating informative content](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

### fwd.digital's Approach

  - [Uses AI agents to build customized workflows](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [Implements persona development, intent analysis, and jobs-to-be-done framework](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Utilizes advanced research agents for comprehensive content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Offers flexibility in content creation, from SEO-focused to in-depth analytical pieces](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Proposed Strategy for Dimmo

  - [Create standardized templates for product pages and answers](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Utilize fwd.digital's research agents for extensive data gathering](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)
  - [Focus on sales-specific content to attract target audience](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Aim for aggressive content production and publication](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Discussion about Vendor (potential acquirer/competitor)](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Mention of other competitors like Daydream and Positional](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)

### Partnership Benefits

  - [fwd.digital offers expertise and cutting-edge AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Dimmo provides opportunity for case study and potential industry impact](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [Mutual interest in long-term relationship and feedback loop](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to send NDA and kickoff documents to Dimmo](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
  - [Tentative kickoff date set for February 3rd](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [Dimmo to review meeting recording with CTO (Lucas)](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [Dimmo to provide feedback on proposed strategy and content needs](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Both parties to discuss and finalize engagement terms](https://fathom.video/share/StpRzx1HfKkRuNbyfH2QcDyETQywrXnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
